workflows.name: Claim a critical shipping escalation
workflows.description: An ops user claims the top critical shipping case and moves it into in-review work.
successCriteria: A visible critical case can be selected from the queue.
Ownership can be assigned through the UI.
The queue state change is confirmed with a visible success notice.
failureCriteria: Queue cards cannot be found by accessible button names.
Owner or queue state controls cannot be operated semantically.
Saving the queue state does not show the expected confirmation.

locator.name: Onboarding laptop replacement has not left the warehouse

steps.text: Case ownership and queue state updated.

workflows.name: Find the billing case by duplicate-charge language
workflows.description: An ops user searches with customer language and should still find the billing anomaly case.
successCriteria: Search can find a case by realistic billing language, not only exact title terms.
The billing case opens after the search result is selected.
failureCriteria: Search misses the billing case when the query matches only summary-style customer language.
The matching case cannot be selected from the filtered queue.

locator.name: Annual plan charged twice after seat expansion
Annual plan charged twice after seat expansion

workflows.name: Request admin identity confirmation after SSO migration
workflows.description: An ops user should be able to request the specific admin identity detail needed for the access-recovery case.
successCriteria: The access-lockout case can be opened from the queue.
The confirmation flow offers an admin-identity-specific detail choice.
Applying the confirmation request shows a visible success notice.
failureCriteria: The confirmation flow only exposes unrelated generic detail choices.
The specific admin-identity confirmation cannot be requested through the UI.

locator.name: Workspace admin locked out after SSO domain migration

workflows.name: Issue a billing credit while keeping the follow-up case open
workflows.description: An ops user applies a billing credit but the case should remain in review until finance follow-up is complete.
successCriteria: The billing case resolution flow accepts a credit amount and summary.
Applying the credit shows a visible success notice.
The case remains in review instead of being closed immediately.
failureCriteria: The billing credit action resolves the case immediately even though follow-up is still pending.

locator.name: Annual plan charged twice after seat expansion
